Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The BindMultiSamplingResolveTexture method binds a texture to resolve a multisampled framebuffer attachment to.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: SuccessToken BindMultiSamplingResolveTexture(ITextureBuffer2D* texture, AttachmentType type, size_t index = 0);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The texture that receives resolved multisample data.
The attachment index within the specified attachment type.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise. An assertion will be raised in debug builds if the result is not tested.
